sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 35:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 35:1
items.html: Each vessel is designated for bestowal of GAR or bestowal of VAK. If the vessel bestows GAR, then the place of the bestowal of GAR is its anterior, and the place of the bestowal of VAK is its posterior. If the vessel bestows VAK, the place of the bestowal of VAK is its anterior, and the bestowal of GAR is its posterior. (Inner Light, Item 40)
